data.body:
PLAN-REVIEW APPLIED (manual run of epic messy-moose-jig's process via its v8 rubric + final_gate_3pass.py harness, against this epic + its 10 live children).

OUTCOME: DET floor PASS (check-ac 10 criteria; clarity 7/5). Three-pass: 31 Pass-1 findings -> Pass-3: 0 BLOCK (v1 advisory posture), 15 advisory, 4 dropped, 12 indeterminate (several 'indeterminate' = aggregate verifier returned no verdict; read on merits). Raw: tmp/foundation_review_3pass.json.

SUBSTANTIVE FINDINGS -> REMEDIATIONS (to apply):
1. [E1/COH/E2/E3/G5 — biggest cluster] Pre-existing story roomy-spine-mirth (4df6) COLLIDES with the new decomposition: duplicates S8's properties panel; elevates branch-legibility to a hard AC while the epic defers branch UX; its bpmn-js-properties-panel wiring reads as contradicting 'zero new runtime deps'; bundles 5 sub-problems. => Re-scope 4df6 to layout/edge-waypoint/nesting ONLY; S8 owns properties panel; branch UX stays deferred (S9); clarify 'zero new deps' = PYTHON runtime deps (editor already vendors bpmn-js).
2. [T8 CRITICAL] execution_mode underspecified: enum, where it lives (prompt front-matter, NOT workflow IR), coexistence with the existing step mode:[findings,structured,text], and the single_turn execution protocol (which API, how with: inputs marshal, output format) are undefined — an implementer must invent them. Epic AC wrongly says 'in the IR'. => Pin in S4 + fix epic AC.
3. [G1G2] resolve_prompt replacement-API signature for get_reviewer left implicit (reviewer vs non-reviewer return); 'Relevant code' paths omit src/rebar/llm/. => Specify signature in S3; fix epic paths.
4. [E1] Catalog REMOVAL + get_reviewer caller-migration unverified (only replacement side tested). => Add S3 AC.
5. [T6/T5b/G6] Editor Save non-happy-paths + write-back robustness: both-locations-unwritable, id collision, atomic write, discard-unsaved, /validate timeout. => Add S6+S7 ACs.
6. [T9] Derived-index lifecycle in editor write-back: authoring must regenerate/invalidate index; delete/retire path; stale-read. => Add S6 AC + S3 retire.
7. [E6 — VISION gap] Success criterion = select prompts AND scripted ops from a typed palette, but no child covers scripted-op palette/insertion. => Add to S6.
8. [E1] Terminology drift (contract vs inputs/outputs front-matter vs input_schema/output_schema decorator). => Add mapping to epic.
9. [G5/E2] S7 validates the JSON textarea that S8 removes — coherence/sequencing. => Clarify S7 target carries to structured fields.
10. [T7/T5e] No doc/ADR deliverable for the new patterns. => Add docs ACs.
11. [T12] schema_version old+new read-side coexistence unstated. => Add S2 AC.
ACCEPTED/NOTED (low pri, internal dev tool): T5d accessibility; T4/T12 rollback = git-revert + config-off.

NEXT: apply remediations across epic + S2/S3/S4/S6/S7 + reconcile 4df6.
